title: Rhythm: technical paragraph flow
description: Long technical passage — sustained engineering writing tempo
text: When the cache miss rate exceeded fifteen percent, latency on the read path climbed sharply. The team investigated the root cause and found that recent deploys had reduced the cache TTL from one hour to ten minutes. After restoring the original value and adding a warm-up step on startup, P95 latency dropped back to its baseline of forty milliseconds.

tips.text: Real engineering post-mortems read like this — train it as a daily skill
Long technical sentences need sustained rhythm — no slowdown at terms
